title: Energy Systems Integration Facility
text:
In 2024, ESIF hosted 170 multidisciplinary projects with 85 partners. Our research advanced leading-edge technologies such as self-healing grids, electrolyzers, grid-forming inverters, and a control architecture that heralds a new direction for distributed energy management systems. We also opened the Energy Security and Resilience Laboratory and brought a third-generation supercomputer online. Read more in our summary.
Energy Systems Integration Newsletter
Breakthrough research in energy systems integration is happening at NLR every day. Be the first to know.
